user_query: I'm planning a family vacation and we are interested in attending a football match. Can you provide me with the live scores for today's football matches? Additionally, I want to explore other sports available at the destination. Please share the list of all sports and their details.

TaskList.description: Fetch the live scores of today's football matches.
Retrieve a list of all sports available at the destination.
Combine the live scores with the list of available sports to provide a comprehensive overview.
